summary: Tested mobile UI fixes for Profit Tracker: Simulate Deposit, Withdrawal, Commission dialogs, and Adjust Trade dialog. All mobile dialogs now use full-screen overlays with proper scrolling. Fixed a bug in Commission dialog where handleAddCommission was undefined.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Mobile Commission dialog button was calling undefined function 'handleAddCommission'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile UI for Profit Tracker verified working: 1) Simulate Actions menu opens full-screen overlay on mobile. 2) Simulate Deposit dialog opens as full-screen overlay with scrollable content. 3) Simulate Withdrawal dialog opens as full-screen overlay. 4) Simulate Commission dialog opens as full-screen overlay (fixed undefined function bug). 5) Adjust Trade dialog opens as full-screen overlay with scrollable content - Save/Cancel buttons accessible after scrolling. All tested on iPhone 10 viewport (375x812).

tests_passed: Simulate Actions overlay opens on mobile
Simulate Deposit dialog opens with full-screen overlay
Simulate Withdrawal dialog opens with full-screen overlay
Simulate Commission dialog opens with full-screen overlay
Adjust Trade dialog opens with full-screen overlay
Adjust Trade dialog is scrollable - Save button accessible
